bearer_token.description: Easypromos API bearer token, sent as Authorization: Bearer <bearer_token>. Never logged.

base_url.description: Easypromos API base URL override for tests or proxies.

promotion_id.description: Promotion id the per-promotion streams (stages, users, participations, prizes) are scoped to. Required for those streams; substituted into their /{resource}/{promotion_id} path.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
